overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a lush summer meadow with wildflowers, transitioning from golden hour to dusk as he moves from tall grass onto a dirt path near a lake, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wildflower meadow with scattered deciduous trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through tall grass and wildflowers, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: lush green grass with purple, red, and white wildflowers covering the ground
dense green leafy trees forming the forest edge
distant mountain range with snow-covered peaks visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a dense summer meadow filled with wildflowers during golden hour. Tall grass and flowering plants surround the path while deciduous trees line the edges of the clearing. Distant snow-capped mountains are visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow with prominent mountain backdrop

events.description: lighting shifts from warm golden hour to brighter midday blue as clouds move across the sky

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues through the meadow as the view opens up to reveal more of the distant snow-capped mountains

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail becoming visible through the grass ahead
calm body of water visible in the distance beyond the meadow
small village or settlement with buildings near the lakeshore

segments.scene_description: The meadow opens up to reveal a panoramic view of snow-capped mountains and a distant lake. The lighting shifts to a brighter midday blue. A dirt path becomes visible cutting through the grass ahead, leading toward a small settlement on the shore.

events.description: ground surface transitions from tall grass to compacted dirt path
Geralt turns 180 degrees to face the camera briefly before continuing forward

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns to face the camera revealing his face and armor details, then turns back and continues toward the lake

segments.scene_description: Geralt transitions onto a dirt path as the tall grass gives way to open trail. He briefly turns to face the camera, revealing the lakeside settlement behind him. The snow-capped mountains disappear behind the tree line as the path curves toward the water.

events.description: lighting shifts dramatically to cooler teal tones as dusk settles and clouds cover the sun

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the dirt path into a more forested area as evening approaches

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence posts lining the left side of the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to dusk with dramatic teal lighting as Geralt follows the dirt path deeper into the forest. A wooden fence appears on the left side of the trail while the lake and settlement disappear from view behind the dense tree cover.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant summer meadow that gradually transitions into a shadowed forest at dusk. It begins with Geralt walking through dense wildflowers and tall grass under a golden hour glow, with snow-capped mountains framing the distant horizon. As the meadow opens up, the lighting shifts to a bright midday blue, revealing a panoramic view of a distant lake and a dirt path leading toward a lakeside settlement. The scene then shifts as Geralt moves onto the open trail and turns toward the camera, causing the mountains to vanish behind the tree line as the path curves toward the water. Finally, the environment transforms into a dim forest under dramatic teal dusk lighting, where a wooden fence appears along the trail as the lake and settlement disappear behind dense foliage.
